summary: Phase 2E (Transactional emails via Resend + External webhook sync) - Backend fully tested via pytest (19/19 pass). Frontend /backoffice/emails (4 tabs: Configuracao, Modelos, Envio em massa, Logs) and /backoffice/webhook validated end-to-end via Playwright. All 8 default templates seeded, webhook token auto-generated, triggers create logs correctly, external sync upsert/delete/invalid action behaves as designed.

minor.issue: Existing admin user had role=None (seed_admin only set role on CREATE, never on UPDATE). Broke /api/admin/email-broadcast target=admin (returned 400 'Nenhum destinatario encontrado'). Fixed by testing agent: added update['role']='admin' when existing admin lacks it.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py now 1995 lines - consider splitting email/webhook endpoints into a separate router module for maintainability (>700 lines rule).

email_service.send_email catches generic Exception - logs full stacktrace (.exception) which is good, but reason field may leak internal details (truncated to 300 chars). Consider sanitizing before persisting.
email-broadcast is sequential (for loop, awaits each). For target='all' with 50k users this will be slow; acceptable per spec note but consider a background task + status endpoint for future.
seed_data_creation: Test creates TEST_* templates and TESTEXT* external users; templates cleaned up; network_1 users left (soft). Register test creates test_welcome_<uuid>@example.com user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests cover: 8 default templates seeded, CRUD + reset, email-test endpoint (emails_disabled / no_api_key), broadcast (admin target), email-logs pagination, settings accept new fields, external/network1/sync (401/upsert/delete/invalid action), webhook-logs pagination, token regenerate, register->welcome trigger log. Frontend: both /backoffice/emails (4 tabs) and /backoffice/webhook render correctly, all data-testid present. Note: seed_admin was updated to backfill role='admin'. If MongoDB is reset, the existing admin test_credentials will auto-self-heal on startup.
rca of the issue: Broadcast target=admin failing: seed_admin only set role='admin' on initial CREATE; the existing admin in DB predated that field so role was None. Admin endpoint require_admin() uses access_level check (works), but email-broadcast filters users by {role:'admin'} (returns 0). Fixed by adding backfill in seed_admin update path. No retest needed - test passed after fix.
